summary: Replay Engine (Walk-Forward Backtest) - All 13 backend tests passed, all frontend UI elements verified. Backend: GET /api/replay/defaults, POST /api/replay/run (with empty and custom config), GET /api/replay/runs, GET /api/replay/run/{run_id}, POST /api/replay/compare, POST /api/replay/batch, DELETE /api/replay/run/{run_id}, GET /api/replay/snapshot-stats all working correctly. Frontend: ReplayDashboard component loads at /replay route, Config panel has all inputs (capital, contracts, SL multipliers, TP mode, scale-out, trailing, symbols, cooldown), KPI grid shows all metrics (Sharpe, Sortino, PF, Win Rate, Max DD, etc.), Equity curve renders as SVG, Trade table shows all trades with entry/exit/P&L/exit reason, Breakdown bars show P&L by regime/archetype/exit reason. Replay nav button in main dashboard header navigates to /replay.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/replay/defaults returns complete config with all parameter groups
✅ POST /api/replay/run with empty config uses defaults, returns trades and metrics

✅ POST /api/replay/run metrics include: total_trades, win_rate, total_pnl, sharpe_ratio, sortino_ratio, profit_factor, max_drawdown, equity_curve, regime_breakdown, archetype_breakdown, exit_breakdown
✅ POST /api/replay/run with custom sl_atr_mult produces different results
✅ GET /api/replay/runs returns list sorted by most recent
✅ GET /api/replay/run/{run_id} returns full run details with trades
✅ GET /api/replay/run/{nonexistent} returns 404
✅ POST /api/replay/compare compares multiple runs side by side
✅ POST /api/replay/batch runs multiple configs and ranks by objective (sharpe)
✅ DELETE /api/replay/run/{run_id} deletes run and verifies removal
✅ DELETE /api/replay/run/{nonexistent} returns 404
✅ GET /api/replay/snapshot-stats returns collection statistics
✅ Trades have all required fields (id, symbol, regime, archetype, side, entry_price, exit_price, net_pnl, exit_reason, duration_minutes)
✅ Frontend: /replay route shows ReplayDashboard component
✅ Frontend: Dashboard header shows 'Replay' navigation button
✅ Frontend: Config panel has inputs for capital, contracts, SL multipliers, TP mode, scale-out, trailing, symbols, cooldown
✅ Frontend: After run execution, KPI grid shows all metrics (Sharpe, Sortino, PF, Win Rate, Max DD, etc.)
✅ Frontend: Equity curve renders as SVG chart
✅ Frontend: Trade table shows all trades with entry/exit/P&L/exit reason
✅ Frontend: Breakdown bars show P&L by regime, archetype, and exit reason
critical_code_review_comments: Replay Engine implementation is complete and well-structured
VirtualPosition class handles all position management (scale-out, trailing, break-even)
Metrics calculation includes all required KPIs with proper formulas (Sharpe, Sortino, PF, etc.)
Batch execution supports ML optimization with configurable objective functions
Frontend ReplayDashboard has all required UI elements with proper data-testid attributes

test_credentials.note: Used for API and frontend tests

seed_data_creation: None - tests use live v3_snapshots collection (654 snapshots, 108 actionable signals)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Replay Engine fully tested. Key endpoints: /api/replay/defaults, /api/replay/run, /api/replay/runs, /api/replay/run/{run_id}, /api/replay/compare, /api/replay/batch, /api/replay/snapshot-stats. Frontend route: /replay with ReplayDashboard component. MongoDB collections: v3_snapshots (source data), replay_runs (stored runs), replay_batches (batch results). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_replay_engine.py

feature_verification.GET /api/replay/defaults: Working - returns complete config with all parameter groups
feature_verification.POST /api/replay/run: Working - executes replay, returns trades and metrics, persists to MongoDB
feature_verification.GET /api/replay/runs: Working - lists runs sorted by most recent
feature_verification.GET /api/replay/run/{run_id}: Working - returns full details with trades
feature_verification.POST /api/replay/compare: Working - compares multiple runs side by side
feature_verification.POST /api/replay/batch: Working - runs multiple configs, ranks by objective
feature_verification.Frontend ReplayDashboard: Working - all UI elements present and functional
feature_verification.Frontend Replay nav button: Working - navigates from main dashboard to /replay

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - all tests use live endpoints and MongoDB
